zh.lifeSummary: 當Morris Somes於1606年9月21日在英國巴金哈姆爾哈德亞德受洗時，他的父親William Somes34歲，母親Mrs. William Somes27歲。他於1635年6月4日與Marjorie Johnson在英國貝德福爾可藍費爾德結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1689年1月13日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼艾可格盧斯特享年82歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Morris Somes于1606年9月21日在英国巴金哈姆爾哈德亞德受洗时，他的父亲William Somes34岁，母亲Mrs. William Somes27岁。他于1635年6月4日与Marjorie Johnson在英国貝德福爾可藍費爾德结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1689年1月13日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼艾可格盧斯特享年82岁。

nameMeanings.name: Somes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name, with post-medieval excrescent -s, from Saham Toney (Norfolk), Earl and Monk Soham (Suffolk), or Soham (Cambridgeshire), and perhaps also Siam Hall near Newton (Suffolk), all of which share the same etymology (‘lake estate’, Old English sǣ ‘sea, lake’ + hām ‘village, homestead, estate’).

variants.name: Sones
meanings: perhaps an altered form of Soames; see Somes .

variant of Soane, with post-medieval excrescent -s (see Son ). The -o- in Middle English and early modern English son(e) is a conventional spelling of /u/ before an n. This /u/ became /ʌ/ in Standard English, hence the current pronunciation of Son. If /u/ was lengthened it became /o:/ in Middle English, and then /u:/ in modern English, hence the occasional spelling Soon. In some speakers' dialects, however, it seems that Middle English /u/ may have been lowered to /ɔ/ and lengthened to /ɔ:/, becoming modern English /əu/ represented in the spelling Soane. At any rate, Soon and Soane (also Sone) appear together in the same counties and are presumably alternative pronunciations of the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Morris
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant of Maurice . The spelling Morris was quite common as a given name in the Middle Ages, but it fell out of use and was readopted in modern times, in part from the surname earlier derived from the given name. Among Jews it has been adopted as an Anglicized form of Moses .

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

historicEvents.title: Glorious Revolution
historicEvents.description: The Glorious Revolution brought the downfall of Catholic King James II and the reign of his Protestant daughter Mary and her Dutch husband, William III of Orange.

en.lifeSummary: When Morris Somes was christened on 21 September 1606, in Hardmead, Buckinghamshire, England, his father, William Somes, was 34 and his mother, Mrs. William Somes, was 27. He married Marjorie Johnson on 4 June 1635, in Cranfield, Bedfordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. He died on 13 January 1689, in Gloucester, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 82.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Morris Somes a été baptisé le 21 septembre 1606, à Hardmead, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, William Somes, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Mrs. William Somes, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Marjorie Johnson le 4 juin 1635, à Cranfield, Bedfordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 13 janvier 1689, à Gloucester, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 82 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Morris Somes am 21. September 1606 in Hardmead, Buckinghamshire, England getauft wurde, war sein Vater William Somes 34 und seine Mutter Mrs. William Somes 27. Er hat am 4. Juni 1635 in Cranfield, Bedfordshire, England Marjorie Johnson geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 13. Januar 1689 im Alter von 82 Jahren in Gloucester, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Morris Somes è stato battezzato il 21 settembre 1606 nel Hardmead, Buckinghamshire, England, il suo padre, William Somes, aveva 34 anni e il suo madre, Mrs. William Somes, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Marjorie Johnson il 4 giugno 1635, nel Cranfield, Bedfordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Morì il 13 gennaio 1689, nel Gloucester, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 82 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Morris Somesが1606年9月21日にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアハードメアドで洗礼を受けた時，父William Somesは34歳，母Mrs. William Somesは27歳であった。1635年6月4日にイギリスベドフォードシュアイアクランフィールドでMarjorie Johnsonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1689年1月13日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーエセックスグロウセスターで82歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Morris Somes(이)가 1606년 9월 21일 영국 벅잉함실르 하르드미드에서 침례를 받았을 때, 그의 아버지 William Somes(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs. William Somes(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1635년 6월 4일 영국 베드퍼드실르 크랜필드에서 Marjorie Johnson(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1689년 1월 13일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 에세스 그루스스터에서 82세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Morris Somes foi batizado em 21 de setembro de 1606, em Hardmead, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Somes, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. William Somes, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Marjorie Johnson em 4 de junho de 1635, em Cranfield, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 13 de janeiro de 1689, em Gloucester, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 82 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Morris Somes был крещен 21 сентября 1606 г. в местности хардмид, буккингхамшир, Англия, его отцу по имени William Somes было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Mrs. William Somes, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Marjorie Johnson 4 июня 1635 г. в местности кранфиелд, бедфордшир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Он умер 13 января 1689 г. в местности глоусестир, эссекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 82 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Morris Somes se bautizó el 21 de septiembre de 1606, en Hardmead, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, su papá, William Somes, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Mrs. William Somes, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Marjorie Johnson el 4 de junio de 1635, en Cranfield, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas. Murió el 13 de enero de 1689, en Gloucester, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 82 años.
